accurate.why: Accurately describes the two amendments to the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act; correctly identifies the prior language replaced and the new language inserted.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; the description of the two amendments matches the bill text precisely.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as extending timeframes under the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act (Public Law 106-506).

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes both amendments — to Section 4(f) and Section 10(a) — and the prior language that was replaced.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this brief reauthorization act.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes the September 30, 2034, availability date and October 1, 2024, enactment.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both operative amendments: the cooperative authorities extension and the appropriations availability extension.

concise.why: Somewhat verbose for a two-provision act; quotes statutory language when a plain-English description would suffice.

correct_entities.why: Lake Tahoe Restoration Act (Public Law 106-506), Water Resources Development Act of 2016 correctly cited.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
